revision.comment: Changed protection settings for "[[Template:R to redirect template]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]]: 2638 transclusions ([[User:MusikBot II/TemplateProtector|more info]]) ([Edit=Require extended confirmed access] (indefinite) [Move=Require extended confirmed access] (indefinite))
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R to redirect template |name=To a redirect category (rcat) template |from=an alias/shortcut (usually), or from a redirect that is the result of a page move/rename, |to=a redirect category ([[WP:RCAT|rcat]]) template |template category=Redirects to redirect templates |other category=Redirects to template namespace |printworthy=no }}<includeonly>{{{category|[[Category:Redirects to redirect templates]]}}}</includeonly><noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R to redirect template |name=To a redirect category (rcat) template |from=an alias/shortcut (usually), or from a redirect that is the result of a page move/rename, |to=a redirect category ([[WP:RCAT|rcat]]) template |template category=Redirects to redirect templates |other category=Redirects to template namespace |printworthy=no }}<includeonly>{{{category|[[Category:Redirects to redirect templates]]}}}</includeonly><noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23530060143|commit triggered pipeline]]
